arts.sum: And he was important for us today, I think we'd missed him the last couple of games. "As I said before the game, he played 45 (minutes against Elfsborg on Thursday night).

arts.ttl: Axel Disasi to Tottenham: Ange Postecoglou breaks silence on Chelsea transfer 'agreement'
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur manager Ange Postecoglou breaks his silence on claims that the Lilywhites have agreed a loan deal for Chelsea defender Axel Disasi.

arts.ttl: Ange Postecoglou hails 'outstanding' Tottenham stars as they ease pressure on Spurs boss with win at Brentford - and gives verdict on new £20.5m signing
arts.sum: MATT BARLOW AT THE GTECH COMMUNITY STADIUM: It had been a most untypical performance, back at the venue where his Spurs tenure began.

arts.ttl: Tottenham beat Wolves to sign Lens defender Danso
arts.sum: Austria international Kevin Danso looked set to join Wolves but has chosen to move to Tottenham instead.

arts.ttl: Thomas Frank says Tottenham did something 'fantastic' during 2-0 win over Brentford
'Hurting' Spurs find defensive strength before defining week
arts.sum: In a week that could define their season, Tottenham answer their critics with a superb and resolute victory at Brentford.

Brentford remain without a home win in 2025 after losing 2-0 to Tottenham. Here’s how we rated the Bees players. Hakon Valdimarsson: 5 Struggled on his Premier League debut. Mistake for the Tottenham opener will be highlighted but also had a couple of nervy moments with the ball at his feet. Kristoffer Ajer: 6 Was […] The post Brentford v Tottenham player ratings appeared first on West London Sport.

arts.ttl: ‘So proud’: James Maddison left stunned by £20m Tottenham player against Brentford
arts.sum: Unfortunately for James Maddison, he wasn’t able to be part of Tottenham Hotspur’s timely win and excellent performance against Brentford. Ange Postecoglou desperately needed a...

arts.ttl: Ange Postecoglou names three players that have lifted Tottenham after Brentford win
arts.sum: Djed Spence returned with an impressive performance against Brentford, while Micky van de Ven is also back - and Tottenham confirmed the signing of Kevin Danso this weekend

arts.ttl: Chelsea news: Axel Disasi REJECTS Tottenham despite transfer agreement
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur have agreed a deal to sign Axel Disasi on loan until the end of the season, but the Chelsea star has reportedly rejected the move. Tottenham have recently ramped up talks to sign Disasi on a short-term deal until the end of the campaign and they have now reached an agreement with Chelsea, according to Fabrizio Romano.
